description_long: This house is a single-family residential building with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a modest yard and several trees. The structure features a prominent gable roof with a central peak and symmetrical slopes, typical of suburban homes. The front facade includes a main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a clearly defined door, flanked by windows on either side. The windows are arranged in a balanced, symmetrical pattern, contributing to a classic and orderly appearance. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, with minimal decorative elements and a clean, functional design. The property is bordered by a paved driveway and walkways, with landscaping elements such as bushes and trees providing additional visual interest.
description: A rectangular, gable-roofed house with a central entry porch, symmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard with trees and walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, central door, and symmetrical windows, with trees and landscaping visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the gable roof profile, and additional yard space with trees.
description_view_2: Rear or angled view showing the back yard, more landscaping, and less detail of the entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the full roofline, side windows, and a clear view of the yard and trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with small porch, steps, and a single main door flanked by windows
